column.name: FPLNR
column.description: Billing Plan Number / Invoicing Plan Number

column.name: BEDAT
column.description: Start date for billing plan/invoice plan

column.name: HORIZ
column.description: Rule for Determining Horizon in Billing/Invoicing Plan

column.name: BEDAR
column.description: Rule for Origin of Start Date of Billing/Invoicing Plan

column.name: ENDAR
column.description: Rule for Origin of End Date for Billing/Invoicing Plan

column.name: PERIO
column.description: Rule for Origin of Next Billing/Invoice Date

column.name: FPLAE
column.description: Length of a standard period in the billing plan

column.name: LODAR
column.description: Rule for Origin of Start Dates

column.name: PERAF
column.description: Rule for Determination of a Deviating Billing/Invoice Date

column.name: FAKCA
column.description: Calendar for Defining Days Relevant to Billing/Invoicing

column.name: TNDAR
column.description: Rule for Origin of End Dates

column.name: AUFPL
column.description: Routing number of operations in the order

column.name: RSPOS
column.description: Item Number of Reservation / Dependent Requirements

column.name: AUST2
column.description: Payment cards: Totals status - Call external system

column.name: AUST3
column.description: Payment cards: Overall status - Responses from ext. system

column.name: AUTKOR
column.description: Automatic creation of correction dates in billing plan

column.name: _DATAAGING
column.description: Data Filter Value for Data Aging
